arts.ttl: Arsenal have dream five-game Bukayo Saka Champions League scenario as Mikel Arteta boost imminent
arts.sum: That can extend towards the end of April and then the start of May. I f all goes well, Arsenal will play in the last game of the European season on May 31: The Champions League final. All but through in the Champions League to the quarter-finals, Mikel Arteta's side only have meaningful fixtures until April 16, for now.
